analysis.consistency: High. The mechanics for duplicate destruction and the probability scaling based on the remaining number of duplicates are clearly defined.
analysis.quality: High. The description is comprehensive, detailing setup, interaction with attacks, duplicate durability, and conditions for ending the spell, as well as counter-conditions (truesight, blindsight).

mechanics.core_effect: Creates three illusory duplicates to misdirect attackers.

duplicate_attributes.damage_resistance: Ignores all other damage and effects

counter_conditions: Creature relies on senses other than sight (e.g., blindsight)
Creature can perceive illusions as false (e.g., truesight)
